authoritative_source.authority_status: current EMBL-EBI endpoint reachable; legacy Sanger endpoint returns 410 Gone and points to deciphergenomics.org
authoritative_source.observed_release: DECIPHER v11.39 landing page observed; no data files, patient records, or API payloads downloaded
authoritative_source.version_pinning_strategy: pin by DECIPHER version string, endpoint, retrieval date, terms file version/checksum, data-file inventory, and API/download policy after review

artifact_contract.freshness_rule: refresh probe metadata when DECIPHER version, host, terms, data-file inventory, API access, consent/privacy policy, or payload policy changes

fail_fast_probe_design.record_scope: one DECIPHER source governance record only; no patient, variant, phenotype, or data-file rows until terms and privacy review clear ingestion
required_outputs: candidate comparison or crosswalk shell when applicable
success_criteria: DECIPHER authority, host migration, access gate, and terms state recorded
payload handling path classified as commit-safe or local-only
review handoff remains candidate-only and human-review-required

human_review_and_llm_policy.llm_output_allowed: metadata and review-assistance only until DECIPHER terms, privacy, consent, API, and data-file scope are cleared

telemetry.source_version: DECIPHER v11.39 observed on current public landing page; no data files, patient records, or API payloads downloaded
telemetry.validation_command: pixi run build-ontology-network; pixi run validate-conductor; pixi run validate-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network-artifacts; pixi run test-conductor-validation; git diff --check
open_blockers: DECIPHER terms of use review required
consent and privacy scope review required before any patient, phenotype, or variant payload use
data-file and API access policy review required
release/version pinning required before downstream crosswalk or review artifacts
